description: iubenda provides compliance tools for websites and apps, including privacy and cookie policies, cookie consent management, consent records, terms and conditions, whistleblowing, and accessibility features. It serves businesses that need to manage privacy-law compliance across sites, apps, and user consent flows.
summary: iubenda exposes documented HTTP integration surfaces for privacy-policy generation, Consent Database access (server-side and JavaScript), and the Quick Generator widget; authentication is via iubenda-issued API keys, with OAuth endpoints also publicly exposed for client registration/authorization flows.
